rationale: The citing paper frames its contribution as extending prior “advertising-centric” meta-analyses and correcting long-term/carryover interpretation, while the cited 2011 paper is a major advertising meta-analysis that reports both short- and long-term elasticities with moderator-based hierarchical modeling. Given this close methodological and substantive alignment in the notes (not just a generic topical overlap), the citation is plausibly a benchmark/foundation rather than an incidental mention. With a confirmed DOI match, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
